command: uv run wmb run --dataset synthetic-mini --system bm25 --limit 5
notes: Tiny smoke suite; useful for sanity checks, not a realistic long-memory benchmark.
known_limitations: Too small to compare systems rigorously.

gold_usage_detail: No gold labels are used during retrieval or answering for this row.
command: uv run wmb run --dataset synthetic-wiki-memory --system bm25 --limit 50
notes: Deterministic open-QA extraction over retrieved notes.
known_limitations: Does not model wiki maintenance operations explicitly.

gold_usage_detail: No gold labels are used during retrieval or answering for this row.
command: uv run wmb run --dataset synthetic-wiki-memory --system clipwiki --limit 50
notes: Evidence-first wiki compiler and metadata-aware deterministic answer extraction.
known_limitations: Multi-page synthesis is still heuristic and can miss some non-literal aggregations.

gold_usage_detail: No gold labels are used during retrieval or answering for this row.
command: uv run wmb run --dataset locomo-mc10 --system bm25 --limit 50
notes: Lexical retrieval over session summaries and full sessions.
known_limitations: No learned reranking; sensitive to wording and long-session noise.

gold_usage_detail: No gold labels are used during retrieval or answering for this row.
command: uv run wmb run --dataset locomo-mc10 --system vector-rag --limit 50
notes: Local embedding baseline with in-memory index.
known_limitations: First run may be slower because embeddings and model weights are loaded locally.

gold_usage_detail: No gold labels are used during retrieval or answering for this row.
command: uv run wmb run --dataset locomo-mc10 --system clipwiki --limit 50 --mode full-wiki
notes: Deterministic wiki compiler in full-wiki mode with no oracle evidence selection.
known_limitations: Page compilation and heuristic answer extraction still lose information relative to raw retrieval baselines.
